zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude de Montmorency於大約1200年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦薩瑟勒斯蒙特莫倫希時，她的父親Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency28歲，母親Gertrude de Soissons32歲。她於大約1215年與Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1256年在法國洛萊沃斯格斯雷朗格斯享年57歲，埋葬在法國洛萊沃斯格斯雷朗格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude de Montmorency于大约1200年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦薩瑟勒斯蒙特莫倫希时，她的父亲Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency28岁，母亲Gertrude de Soissons32岁。她于大约1215年与Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1256年在法国洛萊沃斯格斯雷朗格斯享年57岁，埋葬在法国洛萊沃斯格斯雷朗格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude de Montmorency was born about 1200, in Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, her father, Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency, was 28 and her mother, Gertrude de Soissons, was 32. She married Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine about 1215. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1256, in Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude de Montmorency est née environ 1200, à Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, son père, Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Soissons, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine environ 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1256, à Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude de Montmorency um 1200 in Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency 28 und ihre Mutter Gertrude de Soissons 32. Sie hat um 1215 Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1256 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Relanges, Vosges, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Relanges, Vosges, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Montmorency è nata il circa 1200 nel Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Gertrude de Soissons, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine circa 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1256, nel Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Montmorencyが約1200年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼサルセレスモントモーエンシで生まれた時，父Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorencyは28歳，母Gertrude de Soissonsは32歳であった。約1215年にThierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1256年にフランスロレィヌボスジェズレランジェズで57歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌボスジェズレランジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Montmorency(이)가 대략 1200년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 사르셀레스 몽모렌시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude de Soissons(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1256년 프랑스 로레이인 보스그스 렐랭스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 보스그스 렐랭스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Montmorency nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude de Soissons, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine aproximadamente 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1256, em Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude de Montmorency родилась около 1200 г. в местности монтморенси, сарселлесь, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Soissons, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine около 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1256 г. в местности релангесь, фосгесь, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности релангесь, фосгесь, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude de Montmorency nació aproximadamente 1200, en Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Gertrude de Soissons, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine aproximadamente 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1256, en Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Relanges, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia.
